text.fullText:
Why are brokers allowed to get permits and hire workers to call in from other countries to secure American shipments and securure America truckers. This is not only a NATIONAL SECURITY ISSUE BECAUSE THEY STEAL SHIPMEMTS, BUT IT IS THREAT TO OUR ECONOMY!

This is like PRODUCT DUMPING, but mpre severe. It really should be called SERVICE DUMPING. This only helps a foreign country gain market share and control a HUGE segment of our economy.
